name: Illumina, Inc.
description: Illumina, Inc. is a global leader in DNA sequencing and array-based technologies, serving customers in the research, clinical, and applied markets. The company's products and services enable the adoption of genomic medicine, accelerating scientific breakthroughs and improving human health. Illumina provides comprehensive solutions for genetic analysis, including sequencing systems, consumables, and bioinformatics software, which are used in oncology, reproductive health, genetic disease research, and agriculture.
